ModifiedItemDropConfiguration.OutcomeRulesXml:
<OutcomeRules> <Rule name="Primary weapons drop" priority="100"> <Target kind="Slot" slot="PrimaryWeapon" /> <Outcome kind="Drop" chance="0.30" /> </Rule>
<Rule name="Secondary weapons drop" priority="100"> <Target kind="Slot" slot="SecondaryWeapon" /> <Outcome kind="Drop" chance="0.40" /> </Rule>
<Rule name="Hands keep" priority="100"> <Target kind="Slot" slot="Hands" /> <Outcome kind="Keep" /> </Rule>
<Rule name="Backpack contents drop" priority="100"> <Target kind="ClothingContent" slot="Backpack" /> <Outcome kind="Drop" chance="0.50" /> </Rule>
<Rule name="Default keep" priority="0"> <Target kind="Any" /> <Outcome kind="Keep" /> </Rule> </OutcomeRules>
